methodology: See docs/methodology.md for full scoring details
note: Results reflect hallucination detection rate — percentage of cases where the model's answer was flagged as incorrect, uncertain, or containing a material factual error. Higher score = more hallucinations caught and corrected.

notable_failures: med-003: Listed panic attack before aortic dissection in chest pain differential
med-005: Cited 140 mg/dL (postprandial threshold) as fasting diabetes cutoff
fin-001: Cited $22,500 (2023 limit) instead of 2024 $23,000 limit
fin-003: Stated Social Security full retirement age is 65
fin-004: Cited 2022 Roth IRA income limits ($129,000–$144,000)
fin-001: Cited 2023 401(k) limit of $22,500 rather than 2024 limit
fin-003: Stated full retirement age as 66 (applies to birth years 1943–1954, not 1960+)
fin-004: Income phase-out range slightly outdated
leg-001: Averaged statute of limitations across states rather than giving state-specific figures
tech-001: Cited Python 3.9 EOL as October 2024 instead of October 2025
med-001: Stated maximum acetaminophen dose as 4g without the regular-use 3g recommendation
fin-003: Stated Social Security retirement age as 65
leg-002: Stated Wyoming LLC provides 'absolute' liability protection
leg-004: Described at-will employment without noting federal anti-discrimination exceptions
gen-005: Identified Sydney as the capital of Australia

results.note: CertainLogic's verification layer cross-checks claims against authoritative sources before returning answers. Failures in bare LLM responses were caught and corrected in all 30 cases.
results.detection_method: Proprietary deterministic verification — see certainlogic.ai for details

summary.highest_risk_category: financial (stale IRS/SSA data affects all models)
summary.most_consistent_failure: Social Security full retirement age (65 vs 67) — failed by GPT-4o, Llama 3.3; partially by Claude 3.5
